name: Sweet Maple Coffeecake (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup flour, yeast, and salt in a mixer bowl.
2. Warm milk, water, and butter in a small saucepan.
3. Add liquid, eggs, and honey to flour mixture; beat until smooth, about 3 minutes on electric mixer.
4. Stir in enough remaining flour to make a soft, sticky dough. Turn out onto floured board; continue to work in flour until dough can be kneaded.
5. Knead until smooth and elastic, but still soft (about 5 minutes). Cover with a bowl; let rest 30 minutes.
6. Divide dough in half; roll each half into a 15x12 inch rectangle.
7. Spread with Maple Filling.
8. Fold each rectangle in thirds, making a 15x4-inch strip.
9. Cut into 10 equal pieces.
10. Place strips of dough in greased 8x4x2-inch loaf pans, cut side down.
11. Cover; let rise 30 minutes.
12. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes (2 loaves).
